checks.name: lifecycle extended with OBSERVED state

checks.name: lifecycle extended with MODULE_CANDIDATE state

checks.name: 7 transition methods implemented
checks.description: review, reject, promote, activate, elevate_to_capability, elevate_to_module, supersede

checks.name: AI actor rejection enforced
checks.description: Actors starting with ai_ or system_ raise LifecycleViolation for operator-required transitions

checks.name: 3-specimen threshold for CAPABILITY_CANDIDATE
checks.description: elevate_to_capability requires specimen_refs with 3+ entries or 3+ ingestion sources in registry

checks.name: batch_review for multi-event governance

checks.name: get_promotable returns grouped events
checks.description: Returns events grouped by lifecycle state with available transitions and event metadata

checks.name: session transition log
checks.description: get_transition_log returns all transitions made in session with event_id, from/to state, actor, timestamp

checks.name: emit_learning_promotion added to ChronicleEmitter
checks.description: Emits learning_promotion event, maps target state to semantic phase, tracks learning_events_captured counter

checks.name: semantic phase mapping for learning transitions
checks.description: REVIEWED→FORMATION, PROMOTED→STRENGTHENING, CONSUMABLE→STABILIZATION, CAPABILITY_CANDIDATE→CONVERGENCE, MODULE_CANDIDATE→PROJECTION, REJECTED/SUPERSEDED→TENSION

checks.name: CONSUMPTION_ELIGIBLE_STATES extended

checks.name: append-only transition log per event
checks.description: Each event accumulates transition_log entries with from_state, to_state, actor_id, justification, timestamp

checks.name: existing registry backward compatible
